item.TDLINE: We hereby ask you to deliver the following goods in accordance with our

W.r.t this Rejection Purchase Order we here by ask
W.r.t this Rejection Purchase Order we here by ask
1.,,Kindly mention the item code in your tax-invoice.
2.,,TC & IR to be submitted with every lot.
3.,,Material should be dispatched as per our MSS given to you.
